'''vachuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wabbler|wabbler]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wabbler|wabbler]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vachuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væchirith|væchirith]] || [[word:væchirij|væchirij]] || [[word:væchirish|væchirish]] || [[word:væchiri|væchiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vachuchuruth|vachuchuruth]] || [[word:vachuchuruj|vachuchuruj]] || [[word:vachuchurush|vachuchurush]] || [[word:vachuchuru|vachuchuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vachuruth|vachuruth]] || [[word:vachuruj|vachuruj]] || [[word:vachurush|vachurush]] || [[word:vachuru|vachuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vachufruth|vachufruth]] || [[word:vachufruj|vachufruj]] || [[word:vachufrush|vachufrush]] || [[word:vachufruf|vachufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vachuruthu|vachuruthu]] || [[word:vachuruju|vachuruju]] || [[word:vachurushu|vachurushu]] || [[word:vachuruku|vachuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vachuruth|vachuruth]] || [[word:vachuruj|vachuruj]] || [[word:vachurush|vachurush]] || [[word:vachuru|vachuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vachuruthul|vachuruthul]] || [[word:vachurujul|vachurujul]] || [[word:vachurushul|vachurushul]] || [[word:vachurukul|vachurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vachuruthuthu|vachuruthuthu]] || [[word:vachurujuju|vachurujuju]] || [[word:vachurushushu|vachurushushu]] || [[word:vachuruku|vachuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vachuruthun|vachuruthun]] || [[word:vachurujun|vachurujun]] || [[word:vachurushun|vachurushun]] || [[word:vachurukun|vachurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vachuruthuoro|vachuruthuoro]] || [[word:vachurujuoro|vachurujuoro]] || [[word:vachurushuoro|vachurushuoro]] || [[word:vachurukuoro|vachurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
